Abstract Factory for player and enemy aggregate creation.
Strategy used by BattleEngine to compute initiative order.
Strategy-like behavior objects merged and applied by StatusEffectRegistry.
Observer callback used by CLI and GUI for live event streaming.
Generated from the current production source under src/main/java.
Tests under src/test/java were scanned but omitted to keep the diagram architectural.
JDK and Swing types remain in signatures as referenced types, but are not modeled as standalone classes.
